channel.title: ClickSolveTools Blog
channel.description: Guides, tutorials, and tips on free online tools for finance, development, health, images, and productivity.

item.title: How to Calculate Your Monthly Mortgage Payment (With Formula and Examples)
item.description: Learn the mortgage payment formula, work through real examples at different rates and terms, and understand amortization, PMI, and extra payments.

item.title: Compound Interest Explained: How Your Money Grows (And How to Calculate It)
item.description: Understand compound vs simple interest, the Rule of 72, and see exactly how $10K grows over 10, 20, and 30 years with real examples and formulas.

item.title: How to Pay Off Credit Card Debt: Avalanche vs Snowball Method (With Calculator)
item.description: Compare the avalanche and snowball debt payoff methods with real numbers. See how much each saves you and pick the right strategy for your situation.

item.title: Salary vs Hourly Pay: How to Compare (And What You Actually Take Home)
item.description: Learn how to convert hourly to annual salary, factor in overtime and benefits, and figure out which pay structure actually puts more money in your pocket.

item.title: ROI Explained: How to Calculate Return on Investment (Simple Guide)
item.description: Master the ROI formula, understand annualized returns (CAGR), and learn when ROI is misleading. Real examples from real estate, stocks, and business.

item.title: How Much Should Your Emergency Fund Be? (Calculate Your Number)
item.description: Calculate your personal emergency fund target based on your monthly expenses. Plus a step-by-step plan to build it from zero starting at $50 per week.

item.title: Rent vs Buy a Home in 2025: The Math Behind the Decision
item.description: A no-nonsense financial comparison of renting vs buying a home. See the break-even calculation, price-to-rent ratio, and scenarios where each option wins.

item.title: What Is Inflation and How Does It Affect Your Money? (With Historical Data)
item.description: Understand what inflation is, how CPI works, and see how purchasing power has changed since 1970. Learn practical strategies to protect your savings.

item.title: JSON Formatting Best Practices: How to Write Clean, Readable JSON
item.description: Avoid common JSON mistakes, learn when to minify vs pretty-print, and follow naming conventions that make your APIs consistent and debuggable.

item.title: Regex Cheat Sheet: The Most Useful Regular Expressions (With Examples)
item.description: A practical regex reference with 20+ ready-to-use patterns for emails, URLs, dates, IPs, and more. Each pattern explained piece by piece with examples.

item.title: JWT Tokens Explained: What They Are, How They Work, and How to Decode Them
item.description: Understand the three parts of a JWT, how the auth flow works, common security mistakes to avoid, and when to use JWTs vs session cookies.

item.title: Cron Expressions Explained: How to Schedule Tasks (Complete Guide With Examples)
item.description: Learn the 5-field cron format, master special characters, and see 15 common cron expressions explained in plain English with scheduling examples.

item.title: SQL Formatting Guide: How to Write Clean, Maintainable SQL Queries
item.description: Write SQL that's easy to read, debug, and review. Covers keyword casing, JOIN indentation, CTEs vs subqueries, and common anti-patterns to avoid.

item.title: How to Calculate BMI: Formula, Categories, and What It Actually Means
item.description: Learn the BMI formula for metric and imperial units, understand the category ranges, and know when BMI is useful versus misleading for your health.

item.title: How to Calculate Your TDEE and Daily Calorie Needs (Step by Step)
item.description: Calculate your BMR with the Mifflin-St Jeor formula, apply activity multipliers, and find your TDEE for weight loss, maintenance, or muscle gain.

item.title: Macros Explained: How Much Protein, Carbs, and Fat Do You Actually Need?
item.description: Understand macronutrients, how many grams of protein, carbs, and fat you need daily, and how to calculate your personal macro split from your TDEE.

item.title: How Is Your Pregnancy Due Date Calculated? (Methods and Accuracy)
item.description: Learn how due dates are calculated using Naegele's rule, conception dating, and ultrasound. Understand why only 4% of babies arrive on the exact date.

item.title: The Best Free Online Tools in 2025: Our Top Picks Across Every Category
item.description: A curated roundup of the best free browser-based tools for finance, development, health, images, PDFs, and productivity. No signups, no downloads.

item.title: How to Merge, Split, and Edit PDFs Online for Free (No Upload Required)
item.description: A step-by-step guide to merging, splitting, extracting text, watermarking, and rotating PDFs entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

item.title: How to Create Strong Passwords: A Complete Guide to Password Security in 2025
item.description: Learn what makes a password strong, why length beats complexity, how password generators work, and what to do if your credentials are leaked in a breach.

item.title: How to Compress Images for the Web Without Losing Quality
item.description: Learn lossy vs lossless compression, when to use JPEG vs PNG vs WebP, and how to find the quality sweet spot that cuts file size without visible loss.

item.title: The Pomodoro Technique: How to Focus Better in 25-Minute Blocks
item.description: A practical guide to the Pomodoro Technique: how it works, why 25 minutes is the sweet spot, common mistakes, and variations for deep work sessions.

item.title: Unit Conversion Cheat Sheet: The Most Common Conversions You'll Ever Need
item.description: Quick-reference tables for length, weight, volume, temperature, speed, and area conversions between metric and imperial units, with the formulas shown.

item.title: How to Create a Professional Invoice as a Freelancer (Template and Tips)
item.description: Everything a freelancer needs on an invoice: line items, payment terms, tax handling, numbering, and follow-up etiquette for unpaid invoices.

item.title: How to Improve Your Typing Speed: From 30 WPM to 80+ WPM
item.description: A practical plan to double your typing speed. Covers touch typing fundamentals, daily practice routines, bad habits to break, and how to track progress.
